title: EMM 标签
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype and scripted 1920x1080 legacy characterization are preserved; the active book's bounded legacy and manual EMM tags are loaded once through the canonical Reader metadata service; namespaces and translations retain stable identity; missing book, missing EMM, empty, loading and failure states remain distinct; failure retry is explicit and abortable; the Card is independently deferred; and desktop plus constrained-card evidence proves stable Reader image identity and responsive wrapping.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: React receives the active session and client explicitly, then uses an abortable active-only effect plus a pure bounded tag projection.
The production map callback computes each translated label before returning the semantic tag element.
The browser consumes a versioned authenticated Reader DTO; Node database and translation sources stay behind the application service.

sourceUiInventory.title: 书籍、EMM 与标签状态
acceptanceItems: 未打开书籍显示两行居中提示
当前书籍无 EMM 记录显示独立两行提示
EMM 记录存在但无标签显示暂无标签
加载和失败不得伪装成无 EMM 数据
切书或关闭会话后不得保留上一书籍标签

sourceUiInventory.title: 翻译标签流
acceptanceItems: 对象命名空间中的标签按源顺序展平
标签以紧凑可换行 bordered chip 呈现
有中文翻译时显示译名并用 title 保留原标签
无翻译时显示原标签且不添加冗余 title
重复和异常超长标签受后端边界限制

sourceUiInventory.title: 标签数量与有界生命周期
acceptanceItems: 标签流下方显示准确总数
总数使用与旧版一致的次要小字号
Card 隐藏和卸载取消未完成请求
无轮询、无翻页订阅、无浏览器数据库访问

items.title: 版本化有界 EMM 标签 DTO
items.targetContract: The canonical Reader metadata application service reads the active book from the read-only external EMM database and the existing thumbnails/xr override stores, validates a bounded array of namespace/tag pairs and returns it through the authenticated session metadata transport without exposing raw SQLite rows or filesystem configuration.
items.notes: thumbnails.db remains the only NeoView-owned business database. The legacy EMM database.sqlite is a read-only foreign source discovered under APPDATA or supplied explicitly; XR never mutates it or creates a second NeoView main database.

items.title: 命名空间标签展平与稳定去重
items.targetContract: Normalize legacy object and array tag shapes into stable namespace/tag entries, preserve first-seen order, trim invalid values, merge manual overrides without duplicating case-insensitive identities and cap the result before it reaches React.
items.notes: The projection is a pure shared domain function; the Card must not parse arbitrary emm_json.

items.title: 标签翻译与原文提示
items.targetContract: Use the existing bounded platform EMM translation source to attach an optional translated label by canonical namespace/tag identity; render the translation while preserving the original tag as a tooltip, and fall back to the original tag without a redundant tooltip.
items.notes: Translation loading stays process-side and cached; the browser never downloads the full translation dictionary.

items.title: 未打开、无记录、空、加载和错误状态
items.targetContract: Keep the three legacy empty states distinct and add explicit loading, recoverable error and retry states. A transient failure may retain the last successful snapshot only for the same session and must never leak tags across books.
items.notes: A valid EMM record with zero tags is not the same state as a missing record.

items.title: 活动会话单次加载、错误重试与取消
items.targetContract: Load once when the deferred Card becomes active for a session, expose explicit retry only after failure, abort on deactivation, session replacement or unmount, ignore stale completions and perform no polling or page-index subscription.
items.notes: Session static metadata caching may satisfy repeated consumers without adding a second database read.

items.title: 零翻页热路径工作与独立延迟 chunk
items.targetContract: Ship the Card as an independent deferred chunk under 8 KiB, keep the payload and DOM bounded, do not subscribe to page changes, do not poll, and add no parsing, SQLite work or translation lookup to page presentation or thumbnail acquisition.
items.notes: The active book static metadata path is the only permitted database boundary for this Card.

items.title: 旧版紧凑标签流与受限 Card 几何
items.targetContract: Preserve the legacy compact 11px hierarchy, 10px bordered wrapping tags, hover treatment, centered empty states and trailing count from the 1920x1080 characterization while preventing horizontal overflow at 420x360.
items.notes: Long labels may wrap within a chip but may not resize the Card viewport.

items.title: 语义标签列表与状态反馈
items.targetContract: Expose the tags as a named semantic list, retain original text for translated labels, announce loading and recoverable errors without repeated noise, provide a keyboard-operable retry command and keep the count programmatically associated with the list.
items.notes: The source has no shortcut or click command; no new tag action is invented in this migration slice.
